card_description: Brian Eno is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick refines his "Cybernetic Model": the Universe is a "Magnamind" or "Self-Repairing AI Brain System."
